Localization.Description: Assigning sensitive privileges may result in escalation of root privileges

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.id} has granted rights to table {object.value} to user {object.application.account.id}
The user {subject.application.account.id} has granted the ALTER ROLE right to the user {object.application.account.id} in the database {object.path} on the node {event_src.host}
